title: Qayamat
subTitle: Two close friends turn enemies when one becomes a criminal and the other, an IPS officer. Wronged by his friend, the criminal swears to take revenge once he returns from prison.

title: Khuda Kasam
subTitle: CBI Officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She then attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man, who is imprisoned for a crime he never committed.

title: Do Phool
subTitle: Fed up with the irresponsible behaviour of his sons, Diwan Bahadur Atal Rai, a wealthy man, decides to disown them. However, chaos erupt when a son claims that he has murdered his brother.

title: My Life My Story
subTitle: The host invites prominent Bollywood celebrities who open up about their personal life and share interesting anecdotes based on their experiences.

title: Holi Aayi Re
subTitle: Taking advantage of her trusting nature, an unprincipled man seduces a village maiden, only to desert her in her time of need.

title: Navrang
subTitle: Divakar is a poet who adores his wife, Jamuna, and soon begins to see her as his muse in his imagination and even names her Mohini. But his obsession with Mohini begins to destroy his home and career.

title: Mother India
subTitle: Radha, a poor but righteous woman, struggles to raise her children opposing Sukhilala, a greedy moneylender. Despite the hurdles, she refuses to sacrifice her integrity.

title: Mere Hamdam Mere Dost
subTitle: A young man falls in love with a rich heiress posing as a poor girl. Appalled by her deception, he severs ties with her. Soon he learns the shocking truth behind his father's death.

title: Amrit
subTitle: A widowed man and woman face abuse from their respective children and seek comfort from each other instead.

title: Dost
subTitle: Maanav befriends Gopichand, a reformed thief, and helps him secure a job to turn his life around. However, Maanav suddenly disappears and returns just in time to support Gopichand during a crisis.

title: Dost
subTitle: Maanav befriends Gopichand, a reformed thief, and helps him secure a job to turn his life around. However, Maanav suddenly disappears and returns just in time to support Gopichand during a crisis.

title: Hanste Zakhm
subTitle: Mahendru, a widowed police officer, lives with his young daughter Chanda. Through a series of circumstances, he is forced to care for Chanda's best friend, Rekha, who is a prostitute's daughter.

title: Love
subTitle: Prithvi and Maggie fall in love and decide to tie the knot. However, trouble knocks the paradise when Stella, Maggie's mother, objects their match due to his criminal past.

title: Chitchor
subTitle: When Geeta's sister arranges her wedding with a young engineer, their father mistakenly brings the wrong man home. However, as love blossoms between the two, the arrival of a letter startles everyone.

title: Takkar
subTitle: Young Kishan is separated from his family due to the evil intentions of his stepmother and her brother. Years later, he returns under a different identity.

title: Bhawani Junction
subTitle: Ram, a police officer, seeks help of his childhood friend Bhavani to find his wife's killer. However, things get complicated when Ram discovers that Bhavani's son is the culprit.

title: Khandan
subTitle: Radha marries a kind-hearted Govind who is paralysed due to an accident. Though Govind highly respects his uncle and aunt, a property dispute forces them to live like strangers under the same roof.

title: Saathi
subTitle: Ravi marries Shanti, leaving Rajni heartbroken. Unfortunately, Shanti develops a dreaded disease and runs away as she does not want to be a burden on Ravi.

title: Bandhan
subTitle: Dharamchand, a righteous man, hates his father Jeevanlal as he stole to make ends meet. However, things take a turn when Dharamchand is accused of his father's murder.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Aghaat
subTitle: Madhav is a noble union representative who faces opposition from Rustom, a vile man, in a bid to register the most members. When an employee loses his legs, Rustom's abhorrent antics test Madhav.

title: Bandini
subTitle: Devendra, a doctor working at a women's prison, falls for Kalyani, a convicted prisoner. However, things become complicated as the tale behind her crimes unfolds.

title: Janam
subTitle: Rahul, an aspiring filmmaker, struggles with the stigma of being a popular director's illegitimate child. His father, Virendra, has a change of heart after Rahul eventually wins a film award.

title: Dada
subTitle: Jeetu works as a mechanic, lives in a slum area and is all set to marry Kamini, the girl he loves. But his life is destroyed when he is arrested and convicted for killing Kamini's brother.

title: Raaste Kaa Patthar
subTitle: Jai, who lets his employer and superiors use his apartment for sordid trysts, falls in love with Nita, his employer's fiancee.

title: Ganwaar
subTitle: Gopal, the son of a generous landlord, disguises himself as an illiterate villager to protect the villagers from the cruel Vijay Bahadur, the brother of his step-mother.

title: Paappi Devataa
subTitle: Ram and Rahim become best friends after the latter offers shelter to Ram when he comes to Bombay. However, Ram is unaware that Rahim is involved in illegal activities.

title: Toofan
subTitle: Separated at birth, the paths of Shyam, a lousy magician unwittingly roped into a crime, and Toofan, a defender of the people, cross again years later as they reunite to avenge their father.

title: Shor
subTitle: Deepak, a young boy, loses his ability to speak due to a tragic accident. His heartbroken father, Shankar, works hard in order to treat him, but remains unaware of the fate awaiting him.
